full_text: Alright, let's do a quick standup. Sure. Yesterday I finished the authentication refactor and pushed it to staging. Nice. Any issues with the OAuth flow? One edge case with expired refresh tokens. I added a retry with exponential backoff. Tests pass now. Good. I'm working on the recording API integration today. Should have a PR up by end of day. Want me to review it? I have some bandwidth this afternoon. That would be great. I'll ping you when it's ready.
